allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); exports=p.get\(''exports'',{}\); [print\(k\) for k in exports.keys\(\) if ''account'' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(pnpm add class-variance-authority radix-ui @phosphor-icons/react clsx tailwind-merge)
Bash(git commit -m "Add UI dependencies: cva, radix-ui, phosphor-icons, clsx, tailwind-merge")
Bash(git commit -m "Exclude ui-inspo from TypeScript compilation")
Bash(git commit -m "Add button primitive with asChild support")
Bash(git commit -m "Add dialog primitive re-exporting Radix Dialog parts")
Bash(git commit -m "Add FK constraints and UNIQUE\(user_id, address\) to schema")
Bash(docker exec walty-db-1 psql -U wallet -d wallet -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker exec walty-db-1 psql -U wallet -d wallet -c "SELECT * FROM drizzle.__drizzle_migrations")

Bash(docker exec walty-db-1 psql -U wallet -d wallet -c "CREATE TABLE ""wallet_backups"" \(""id"" serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, ""user_id"" integer NOT NULL REFERENCES ""users""\(""id""\) ON DELETE CASCADE, ""wallet_address"" text NOT NULL, ""ciphertext"" text NOT NULL, ""iv"" text NOT NULL, ""salt"" text NOT NULL, ""version"" integer NOT NULL, ""created_at"" timestamp DEFAULT now\(\), ""updated_at"" timestamp DEFAULT now\(\)\)")
